title: Copy and paste like a pro
drDigitalIntro: Let's master the two shortcuts you'll use constantly: copy and paste. Watch the video, then give it a try below.

playgroundTask.instructions: Copy the text below, then paste it into the box.

drDigitalSuccess: Nice work! You just saved yourself a ton of right-clicking.
drDigitalHint: Try selecting the text first — click and drag across it — then use the shortcut.
